mapper.select: /* USE : DataRcvStatusMapper.getDataRcvStatusDtlList */ SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.LOG_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LOG_DATE , A.STORE_CD , NVL(tms.STORE_NM, '') AS STORE_NM , A.POS_NO , A.LOG_SEQ , A.MS_CD , A.MS_CD_NM , A.MS_CD_ENG_NM , A.VIEW_YN , A.REQ_SEQ , A.RES_CNT , A.MIN_PROC_SEQ , A.MAX_PROC_SEQ FROM TB_LG_MST_COUNT_LOG_DTL A , TB_MS_STORE tms WHERE A.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND tms.HQ_OFFICE_CD = A.HQ_OFFICE_CD AND tms.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD AND A.LOG_DATE = #{logDate} AND A.STORE_CD = #{storeCd} AND A.POS_NO = #{posNo} AND A.LOG_SEQ = #{logSeq} AND A.VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.MS_CD
